title: athyrium iseanum
intro: Athyrium iseanum, also known as Japanese lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. This plant is native to Japan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Athyrium iseanum include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
